productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Triple Truffle Jays - .5g Pack - Lemon Drop - 1g
description: A hybrid infused blunt built around Lemon Drop and enhanced with extract, blended in for a smooth, even burn and an elevated experience. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and tea, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
